flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Alaska Anchorage fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Alaska Anchorage fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($25.2k → $21.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Alaska Anchorage fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.6k → $7.7k).
